ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-28-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Patricia M. Evezich #1193.
There being no appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-01-2003 Reset To Aug-28-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, CSR: Susan Lee, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Petitioner: Wah Fung Lim, mother of Joanne Sai Yin Lee, a minor present in pro per with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan
Petioner was instructed to get legal help to prove that father is not available to sign petition.
The matter is continued to August 28, 2003 in Dept. 218
